Owner: suban
Last Reviewed: 2026-04-05
Source of Truth: .github/prompts/bugfix.prompt.md
Validation Method: Code + Tests

You are a senior Python debugging expert.

Fix the bug in the provided code.

Requirements:
- Identify root cause
- Apply minimal fix
- Add test coverage
- Maintain existing functionality
- Use the local `.venv` virtual environment for Python setup and package installation
